seoTitle: How to Make a Price List on Canva Easily
metaDescription: Learn how to make a price list on Canva to showcase products or services clearly, using templates for menus, rates, or catalogs.
intro: A clean, organized price list helps customers understand your offerings at a glance, whether you're a restaurant, freelancer, or service provider. Canva's templates make it easy to design one that fits your brand. This guide walks through the process.

steps.heading: Choose a price list template
steps.body: Search Canva for menu, rate card, or price list templates to find a layout suited to your business.

steps.heading: List your products or services
steps.body: Enter item names along with clear, accurate pricing information.

steps.heading: Organize items into sections
steps.body: Group related products or services together so the list is easy to scan.

steps.heading: Add branding touches
steps.body: Include your logo and brand colors so the price list feels consistent with your other materials.

steps.heading: Export and share
steps.body: Download the finished price list as an image or PDF to print, email, or post online.

faq.question: Can I update prices later without redesigning the whole list?
faq.answer: Yes, you can edit the text directly in Canva and re-export whenever prices change.

faq.question: Are price list templates free in Canva?
faq.answer: Many are free, with additional premium designs available under Canva Pro.

faq.question: Can I make a price list for a printed menu board?
faq.answer: Yes, you can set a custom size to match your menu board or signage dimensions.

faq.question: Can I add images of products next to prices?
faq.answer: Yes, most price list templates support adding small photos alongside each item.
